chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-298 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case Syed Sohail Shah Rizvi, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G for the State. Date of Hearing & Order: 26-04-2024 O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J.- After hearing the parties, impugned order dated 02.05.2023, passed by learned Additional Sessions Judge-IV/Justice of Peace, Khairpur is set aside, being not based on reasons regulating 154 CrPC; and based on consideration of irrelevant grounds having no nexus with the alleged offence. SHO, P.S, Shaheed Murtaza Mirani-Khairpur is directed to record statement of the applicant and incorporate the same in a book kept for 154 CrPC, if cognizable offence is made out. Accordingly, this Crl. Misc. Application is allowed in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
